214 F0800R_STF_TIME_AWAY_NH_CD F0800R_STF_TIME_AWAY_NH_CD F0800R Staff Assessment: Time Away Nursing Home Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident prefers spending time away from the nursing home. -=Not assessed/no information

1=Checked (Yes)
^=Blank (skip pattern)
